commands/explain-pr-changes.md has no YAML frontmatter — name: field absent — File begins with '# Explain PR Changes' with no preceding '---' YAML block; grep for frontmatter delimiters returns zero matches

commands/explain-pr-changes.md has no YAML frontmatter — description: field absent — File begins with '# Explain PR Changes' with no preceding '---' YAML block; description: key absent from the file entirely
commands/explain-pr-changes.md missing allowed-tools: declaration while using Bash — No frontmatter block exists; allowed-tools: key absent; command invokes git and gh CLI (Bash) without declaration
.claude/commands/add-skill.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block opens with description: and argument-hint: but contains no name: key
.claude/commands/add-skill.md missing allowed-tools: declaration — Command body instructs use of Task, AskUserQuestion, Bash, Read, Edit; none appear in frontmatter allowed-tools

commands/sync-skills-readme.md missing allowed-tools: declaration — Command body instructs use of Bash, Read, Edit; none declared in frontmatter allowed-tools
commands/compose-email.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block has description:, argument-hint:, allowed-tools: but no name: key
commands/codex-plan.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block has description:, argument-hint:, allowed-tools: but no name: key

commands/codex-plan.md allowed-tools lists 'AskUser'; correct name is 'AskUserQuestion' — allowed-tools field contains 'AskUser'; the registered Claude Code tool name is 'AskUserQuestion' — grep of Claude Code schema confirms no tool named AskUser exists
commands/sync-branch.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block has description:, argument-hint: but no name: key
commands/sync-branch.md missing allowed-tools: declaration — Command body uses git commands (Bash) but allowed-tools: absent from frontmatter
commands/explain-changes-mental-model.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block has description:, argument-hint: but no name: key
commands/explain-changes-mental-model.md missing allowed-tools: declaration — Command body uses Bash (git log) but allowed-tools: absent from frontmatter
commands/viral-tweet.md missing required name: frontmatter field — Frontmatter block has description:, argument-hint: but no name: key
commands/viral-tweet.md missing allowed-tools: declaration — Command body references Bash or Write for output but allowed-tools: absent from frontmatter

commands/viral-tweet.md multi-step workflow uses thematic headers instead of numbered steps — Body uses '## Research Phase', '## Draft Tweets', '## Selection' headings instead of '1. ...', '2. ...', '3. ...' numbered steps
agents/general-purpose.md has zero invocation examples — 54-line file contains no '## Examples', no invocation sample, no demonstration of expected input/output

agents/general-purpose.md uses 'appropriate' three times as a vague instruction — Body contains 'appropriate' three times without measurable criteria (e.g., 'appropriate tools', 'appropriate context', 'appropriate response')
agents/mermaid-diagram-specialist.md missing required model: frontmatter field — Agent frontmatter contains name:, description:, category:, usage:, input:, output: but no model: key
skills/reducing-entropy/SKILL.md has no Output Format section or example of expected deliverable
generate_test_cases.sh uses eval to assign unsanitized stdin input — shell injection risk in automated contexts
create_bug_report.sh uses eval to assign unsanitized stdin input — shell injection risk in automated contexts
